overview: I set up a Python dev environment, generated my first Anthropic API key, and made my first Claude API call in ~10 lines of code. Despite struggling with venv activation and CLI basics, Claude got me past the setup wall that stopped me cold in 2018.

keyPoints.title: First working API call took only 10–15 lines of code
venv activation resets every terminal session — a costly surprise
Running Claude via API exposes every parameter the chat UI hides
Real dev work — setup, deployment, debugging — resists vibe-coding
